title: Semantic Generative Tuning for Unified Multimodal Models
abstract: arXiv:2605.18714v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) strive to consolidate visual understanding and visual generation within a single architecture. However, prevailing training paradigms independently optimize understanding via sparse text signals and generation through dense pixel objectives. Such a decoupled strategy yields misaligned representation spaces, isolating visual understanding from generation and hindering their mutual reinforcement. This work presents the first systematic investigation into generative post-training, where we formulate hierarchical visual tasks as generative proxies to bridge the isolation in UMMs. Our empirical investigation reveals that high-level semantic tasks, particularly image segmentation, serve as optimal proxies. Unlike low-level tasks that distract models with texture details, segmentation provides structural semantics that significantly enhance both vision-centric perception and generative layout fidelity.

Title: Semantic Generative Tuning for Unified Multimodal Models
Abstract: arXiv:2605.18714v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) strive to consolidate visual understanding and visual generation within a single architecture. However, prevailing training paradigms independently optimize understanding via sparse text signals and generation through dense pixel objectives. Such a decoupled strategy yields misaligned representation spaces, isolating visual understanding from generation and hindering their mutual reinforcement. translated_title: 面向统一多模态模型的语义生成式微调
translated_abstract: arXiv:2605.18714v2 公告类型：替换-交叉 摘要：统一多模态模型（UMMs）致力于在单一架构内整合视觉理解与视觉生成。然而，当前的训练范式通过稀疏文本信号独立优化理解能力，并通过密集像素目标独立优化生成能力。这种解耦策略导致了表示空间的不对齐，将视觉理解与生成隔离开来，阻碍了它们的相互促进。本文首次系统性地研究了生成式后训练，我们将层次化视觉任务构建为生成式代理，以弥合UMMs中的隔离。我们的实证研究表明，高层语义任务，特别是图像分割，是最优的代理。与低层任务（因其纹理细节会分散模型注意力）不同，分割提供了结构语义，显著增强了以视觉为中心的感知和生成的布局保真度。
tldr: 本文提出通过将高层语义任务（如图像分割）作为生成式代理进行后训练，以弥合统一多模态模型中视觉理解与生成之间的表示空间隔离，从而同时提升视觉感知和生成布局保真度。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes using high-level semantic tasks, particularly image segmentation, as generative proxies during post-training to bridge the representation space isolation between visual understanding and generation in unified multimodal models, thereby enhancing both vision-centric perception and generative layout fidelity.
